items.name: dictionary-hero
items.title: Dictionary Hero
items.description: A portfolio hero styled like a dictionary entry with pronunciation audio, portrait media, definitions, examples, and contact action.
items.docs:
Install with your package manager:

npm: npx shadcn@latest add https://design.piyusharyan.online/r/dictionary-hero.json
pnpm: pnpm dlx shadcn@latest add https://design.piyusharyan.online/r/dictionary-hero.json
yarn: yarn dlx shadcn@latest add https://design.piyusharyan.online/r/dictionary-hero.json
bun: bunx shadcn@latest add https://design.piyusharyan.online/r/dictionary-hero.json

items.name: liquid-button
items.title: Liquid Button
items.description: A button featuring an organic gooey liquid-puddle hover morph effect using SVG Gaussian blur filters.
items.docs:
Install with your package manager:

yarn: yarn dlx shadcn@latest add https://design.piyusharyan.online/r/liquid-button.json
bun: bunx shadcn@latest add https://design.piyusharyan.online/r/liquid-button.json

items.name: magnetic-card
items.title: Magnetic Card
items.description: A 3D perspective magnetic card reacting to cursor gravity with parallax interior shifts and radial gradient glow highlights.
items.docs:
Install with your package manager:
